title: lantana glutinosa var. rugosa
intro: Lantana glutinosa var. rugosa, also known as rugose lantana, is a variant of the Lantana glutinosa plant species, belonging to the verbena family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. The plant's leaves and flowers are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems, as well as to promote wound healing and improve respiratory health. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or infused in oil for topical use, and the plant is also used in traditional remedies in various cultures.
